title: External Admissions Application Submission Process
description: The submission of external admissions applications.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

applicationId.title: Application Id
applicationId.description: The unique identifier for a single application.

cccId.title: California Community College Id
cccId.description: The unique identifier for a single user’s account.

collegeId.title: College Id
collegeId.description: The system’s identifier for a particular California Community College.

lastNamePrefix.title: Last Name Prefix
lastNamePrefix.description: The article or preposition portion of an applicant's last name.

alternateFirstNames.title: Alternate First Names
alternateFirstNames.description: Alternate first names for the applicant.

alternateLastNames.title: Alternate Last Names
alternateLastNames.description: Alternate last names for the applicant.

alternateMiddleNames.title: Alternate Middle Names
alternateMiddleNames.description: Alternate last names for the applicant.

races.title: Races
races.description: The racial groups to which an applicant belongs.

hispanic.title: Hispanic/Latino
hispanic.description: Indicates if the applicant is hispanic.’

gender.title: Gender
gender.description: The biological masculinity or femininity of the applicant.

sexualOrientation.title: Sexual Orientation
sexualOrientation.description: The applicant's identity in relation to the gender or genders to which they are attracted.

personalPronoun.title: Personal Pronoun
personalPronoun.description: The applicant's self-selected choice of pronoun.

emails.title: Email
emails.description: The email addresses at which an applicant can be contacted.

type.title: Type
type.description: Indicates the type of email address of an applicant.

address.title: Email Address
address.description: An email address for the applicant.

phones.title: Phone
phones.description: The phones and phone-connected devices at which an applicant can be contacted.

type.title: Type
type.description: Indicates the type of phone number of an applicant.

countryCode.title: CountryCode
countryCode.description: The countrycode of telephone and/or mobile device when dialing internationally.

number.title: Number
number.description: The number assigned to the phone.

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: The extension used to connect to the phone when multiple phones share the same primary number.

textPermission.title: Text Permission
textPermission.description: Indicates user’s permission to send text messages to the phone number.

addresses.title: Address
addresses.description: The physical addresses where an applicant resides or may be contacted by mail.

addressLine1.title: Address Line1
addressLine1.description: The first line of an applicant's address.

addressLine2.title: Address Line2
addressLine2.description: The second line of an applicant's address.

addressLine3.title: Address Line3
addressLine3.description: The third line of an applicant's address.

addressLine4.title: Address Line4
addressLine4.description: The fourth line of an applicant's address.

city.title: City
city.description: The city of an applicant's address.

county.title: County
county.description: The county of an applicant's address.

postalCode.title: Postal Code
postalCode.description: The postal code of the address.

term.title: Term
term.description: The term for which the applicant is applying.

major.title: Major
major.description: The applicant's proposed major course of study.

campusLocation.title: Campus Location
campusLocation.description: The location of the campus to which the applicant is applying

admissionType.title: Admission Type
admissionType.description: The type of admission the applicant is requesting.

citizenshipStatus.title: Citizenship Status
citizenshipStatus.description: The citizenship status of the applicant with regards to the country where a given institution is located.

visa.title: Visa
visa.description: The Visa details of the applicant.

visaNumber.title: Visa Number
visaNumber.description: The identifier number of the visa.

issuedOn.title: Issued On
issuedOn.description: The date when the visa was issued.

expiresOn.title: Expires On
expiresOn.description: The date when the visa will expire.

alienRegistrationNumber.title: Alien Registration Number
alienRegistrationNumber.description: The applicant's alien registration number if non-citizen.

alienRegistrationIssueDate.title: Alien Registration Issue Date
alienRegistrationIssueDate.description: The applicant's alien registration issue date if non-citizen.

alienRegistrationExpirationDate.title: Alien Registration Expiration Date
alienRegistrationExpirationDate.description: The applicant's alien registration expiration date if non-citizen.

issuingAuthority.title: Issuing Authority
issuingAuthority.description: The authority that issued the visa.

visaNationOfIssue.title: Visa nation of issue
visaNationOfIssue.description: The nation that issued the visa.

employmentType.title: Employment Type
employmentType.description: The type of employment for which a visa was issued.

countryOfBirth.title: Country of Birth
countryOfBirth.description: The country in which the applicant was born.

birthCity.title: Birth City
birthCity.description: The city in which the applicant was born.

secondaryLanguages.title: Secondary Languages
secondaryLanguages.description: Other languages that the applicant understands.

countryEntryDate.title: Country Entry Date
countryEntryDate.description: The date the applicant entered the country where the institution is located.

passportNationOfIssue.title: Passport Nation Of Issue
passportNationOfIssue.description: The nation that issued the applicant's passport

passportExpirationDate.title: Passport Expiration Date
passportExpirationDate.description: The expiration date of the applicant's passport

serviceStartDate.title: Service Start Date
serviceStartDate.description: The date the applicant's military service began.

dateOfDischarge.title: Date Of Discharge
dateOfDischarge.description: The date the applicant was discharged from the military.

highSchool.title: High School
highSchool.description: High schools attended by the applicant.

graduatedOn.title: Graduated High School On
graduatedOn.description: The date the applicant graduated from high school.

startDate.title: Start Date
startDate.description: The start date for the attendance period.

endDate.title: End Date
endDate.description: The end date for the attendance period

highestGradeCompleted.title: Highest Grade Completed
highestGradeCompleted.description: Applicant’s highest high school grade completed.

highestEnglishCourseTaken.title: Highest English Course Taken
highestEnglishCourseTaken.description: Applicant’s highest English course taken in high school.

highestEnglishGrade.title: Highest English Course Taken Grade
highestEnglishGrade.description: Applicant’s grade received in the highest English course taken in high school.

highestMathCoursePassed.title: Highest Math Course Passed
highestMathCoursePassed.description: Applicant’s highest math course passed with a Pass in high school.

highestMathCourseTaken.title: Highest Math Course Taken
highestMathCourseTaken.description: Applicant’s highest math course taken in high school.

highestMathCoursePassedGrade.title: Highest Math Course Passed Grade
highestMathCoursePassedGrade.description: Applicant’s grade received for highest math course passed in high school with a Pass.

highestMathGrade.title: Highest Math Course Taken Grade
highestMathGrade.description: Applicant’s grade received for highest math course taken in high school.

educationLevel.title: Education Level
educationLevel.description: Applicant's higher and highest education level related information.

startDate.title: Start Date
startDate.description: The start date for the attendance period.

endDate.title: End Date
endDate.description: The end date for the attendance period

degreeDate.title: College/University Degree Date
degreeDate.description: The date the applicant was awarded the degree.

degreeObtained.title: College/University Degree Obtained
degreeObtained.description: Indicates if the applicant obtained the degree.

parentsAndLegalGuardians.title: Parents and Legal Guardians
parentsAndLegalGuardians.description: The applicant's parents or legal guardians.

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description: The parent or legal guardian's first name.

middleName.title: Middle Name
middleName.description: The parent or legal guardian's middle name.

lastName.title: Last Name
lastName.description: The parent or legal guardian's last name.

relationship.title: Relationship
relationship.description: The parent or legal guardian's Relationship to the applicant.

phoneNumber.title: Phone Number
phoneNumber.description: The parent or legal guardian's phone number

email.title: Email Address
email.description: The parent or legal guardian's email address.

educationLevel.title: Education Level
educationLevel.description: The parent or legal guardian's education level.

educationLevelMis.title: Parent/guardians Education Level: MIS
educationLevelMis.description: Concatenation of parent/guardians Education Level: MIS.

address.title: Address
address.description: The parent or legal guardian's address

addressLine1.title: Address Line1
addressLine1.description: The first line of the parent or guardian's address

addressLine2.title: Address Line2
addressLine2.description: The second line of the parent or guardian's address.

addressLine3.title: Address Line3
addressLine3.description: The third line of the parent or guardian's address.

addressLine4.title: Address Line4
addressLine4.description: The fourth line of the parent or guardian's address.

postalCode.title: Postal Code
postalCode.description: The postal code of the addres.

eligibleForAB540Waiver.title: Eligible for AB540 Waiver
eligibleForAB540Waiver.description: Applicant’s eligibility for admission as calculated by the Submission Calculation Service

homelessYouth.title: Homeless Youth
homelessYouth.description: Indicates if the applicant has been determined to be a homeless youth at any time within the last 24 months.

seasonalAgriculturalWorker.title: Seasonal Agricultural Worker
seasonalAgriculturalWorker.description: Indicates if the applicant has been employed as a seasonal agricultural worker for at least a total of two months of each of the past two years.

fosterYouthStatus.title: Foster Youth Status
fosterYouthStatus.description: Indicates the Foster Youth status of the applicant based on their screen input.

fosterYouthMis.title: Foster Youth MIS
fosterYouthMis.description: Derived field based on foster fosterYouthStatus.

finAidRef.title: Financial Aid Referral Flag
finAidRef.description: Indicates if the applicant has shown any interest in or need for financial aid, as determined by the Submission Calculation Service.

financialAid.title: Financial Aid
financialAid.description: Indicates whether applicant intends to apply for financial aid.

campusHousing.title: Campus Housing
campusHousing.description: Indicates whether applicant is interested in campus housing.

firstGenerationApplicant.title: First Generation Applicant
firstGenerationApplicant.description: Indicates whether applicant is a first generation applicant.

previouslyAttended.title: Previously Attended
previouslyAttended.description: Indicates whether applicant has previously attended the institution

felony.title: Felony
felony.description: Has applicant been convicted of a felony

disciplinaryAction.title: Disciplinary Action
disciplinaryAction.description: Indicates is applicant has been the subject of disciplinary action at a previous institution.

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description: First name of the emergency contact.

lastName.title: Last Name
lastName.description: Last name of the emergency contact.

relationship.title: Relationship
relationship.description: Relationship of the emergency contact to the applicant.

phoneNumber.title: Phone Number
phoneNumber.description: Phone number of the emergency contact.

decisionFactors.title: Decision Factors
decisionFactors.description: The factors influencing the applicant's decision.’

comfortableWithEnglish.title: Comfortable With English
comfortableWithEnglish.description: Indicates applicant's comfort level in reading/writing English.

academicCounseling.title: Academic Counseling/Advising
academicCounseling.description: Indicates applicant's interest in academic advising.

athleticInterestIntercollegiate.title: Athletic Interest: Intercollegiate
athleticInterestIntercollegiate.description: Indicates aplicant's interest in intercollegiate team sports participation.

basicSkills.title: Basic Skills
basicSkills.description: Indicates applicant's interest in assistance with reading, writing, or math.

calWorks.title: CalWorks
calWorks.description: Indicates applicant's interest in CalWORKs monetary aid and services.

careerPlanning.title: Career Planning
careerPlanning.description: Indicates applicant's interest in career planning assistance.

childCare.title: Child Care
childCare.description: Indicates applicant's interest in child care assistance.

counselingPersonal.title: Counseling - Personal
counselingPersonal.description: Indicates applicant's interest in personal counseling.

dsps.title: Disabled Student Programs and Services (DSPS)
dsps.description: Indicates applicant's interest in disabled student programs and services.

eops.title: Extended Opportunity Programs and Services (EOPS)
eops.description: Indicates applicant's interest in extended opportunity programs and services (academic, financial, and/or encouragement for eligible students).

esl.title: English as a Second Language (ESL)
esl.description: Indicates applicant's interest in English as a second language support and/or programs.

healthServices.title: Health Services
healthServices.description: Indicates applicant's interest in health services

employmentAssistance.title: Employment Assistance
employmentAssistance.description: Indicates applicant's interest in employment assistance.

onlineClasses.title: Online Classes
onlineClasses.description: Indicates applicant's interest in online classes.

reEntryProgram.title: Re-Entry Program (After 5 Years Out)
reEntryProgram.description: Indicates applicant's interest in reentry programs

scholarshipInformation.title: Scholarship Information
scholarshipInformation.description: Indicates applicant's interest in scholarship information.

studentGovernment.title: Student Government
studentGovernment.description: Indicates applicant's interest in student government.

testingAssessment.title: Testing, Assessment, Orientation
testingAssessment.description: Indicates applicant's interest in testing., assessment, or orientation.

transferInformation.title: Transfer Information
transferInformation.description: Indicates applicant's interest in transfer information.

tutoringServices.title: Tutoring Services
tutoringServices.description: Indicates applicant's interest in tutoring services.

veteransServices.title: Veterans Services
veteransServices.description: Indicates applicant's interest in veterans services.

athleticInterestIntramural.title: Athletic Interest: Intramural
athleticInterestIntramural.description: Indicates applicant's interest in intramural sports participation.

receivingTanfSsiGa.title: Receiving TANF, SSI, General Assistance
receivingTanfSsiGa.description: To assess if the applicant is currently receiving TANF/CalWORKs, SSI, or General Assistance.

consentIndicator.title: Consent
consentIndicator.description: Indicates applicant's consent to Release Information question.

confirmation.title: Application Confirmation Number
confirmation.description: Confirmation Number assigned by the system when the application is submitted.

nonCredit.title: Non-Credit Status
nonCredit.description: Identifies status of the Non-Credit Application path.

certificationQuestions.title: Certification Questions
certificationQuestions.description: Questions certified by the applicant during application submission

eSignature.title: Electronic Signature
eSignature.description: Confirmation that applicant has provided the required electronic signature for submission of the application.

languageFlag.title: Language Flag
languageFlag.description: The state of the language toggle.

source.title: Application Source
source.description: Indicates the origin of the application.

type.title: Application Type
type.description: Indicates the type of application like CCCApply, Apply etc.

additionalData.title: Additional Data
additionalData.description: Additional data that can be used for reporting, including custom fields.

domainListing.title: Domain Listing
domainListing.description: Indicates if the application is suspected to be fraudulent
